opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I got into a huge shouting match, felt my heart race incredibly fast, and the next thing I knew I was waking up on the floor.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I fainted during an argument at home and my parents are really worried, so we're calling to find out what to do.

symptom_narrative.onset: suddenly, right in the middle of a heated argument this evening
symptom_narrative.duration: I was out for less than a minute, then woke up completely
symptom_narrative.character: my heart started pounding really fast, then everything went black and I collapsed
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: scary — I've never actually passed out before, but I've felt close a few times
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: it's my heart racing and then fainting, not any pain anywhere
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: it happened right at the peak of the argument when I was most worked up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: I felt normal again as soon as I came round — I'm calm now
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: getting really worked up or worked hard — it seems to come on when I'm stressed or pushing myself
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: just the fast heartbeat before I blacked out — no chest pain, no trouble breathing
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had a few spells of feeling really dizzy and lightheaded when I'm playing sport hard over the last year, but I never actually fainted before tonight
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm up and walking around fine now, just shaken and a bit anxious about it

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I've always been healthy — no heart problems or anything that I know of

family_history_as_reported.narrative: One of my cousins on my mum's side died suddenly when he was 16 — he just collapsed while playing basketball. It really shook the family.

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: I play competitive sport and train pretty hard
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: there's been a lot of stress and arguments at home lately

objective_data_offered.value: teenager on video looks well and alert now, talking in full sentences, breathing comfortably, not distressed
parent says he went pale and floppy for under a minute then came round fully with no confusion, and he's back to himself now
about 70 beats per minute at rest right now on his smartwatch
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: consumer smartwatch, single reading taken after he had recovered — it did not capture the fast heartbeat during the episode
